privacy.question: How does CivicShield protect my personal privacy?
privacy.answer: The platform utilizes an isolated sandbox asset architecture. The application never accesses your real phone gallery or private file system; it works strictly through local mock assets to safely compile information before submitting just the single verified hazard data point.

offline.question: Can I report issues if I am in an area with poor internet connectivity?
offline.answer: Yes. CivicShield features built-in Offline Resilience. If your connection drops, your report is cached locally within secure local state and will automatically synchronize with your chosen Municipal Corporation the moment you are back online.

routing.question: How are tickets routed to different Municipal Corporations across India?
routing.answer: When logging in, you select your local corporation branch (e.g., BMC, MCD, BCCMC). Your dashboard workspace is securely targeted to that specific zone, ensuring reports route directly to the designated Corporation Head for that city.

aiValidation.question: What happens if an image uploaded is not an actual public infrastructure hazard?
aiValidation.answer: Our intelligent validation engine instantly analyzes the asset text and visual properties. If an unrelated photo (like a plate of food or a pet) is selected, the system triggers an automatic alert denying submission to ensure worker queues remain unspammed.

about.title: About the National Civic Redressal Initiative
about.desc: An automated, high-accuracy telemetry mapping interface bridging citizens directly with municipal corporations. Powered by live data de-duplication pipelines to optimize city worker field dispatch times.

corps.BCCMC: Bengaluru Central City Municipal Corporation (BCCMC) - Bengaluru

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.n1Desc: Your report regarding the broken street light on Main St has been marked as RESOLVED by the Central City Admin.
notifications.n2Desc: 5 new infrastructure updates were completed in your ward this week. Tap to view the full report.
notifications.n3Desc: Thank you for joining the initiative. Your voice helps build a better community.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I track my submitted report?
faq.a1: You can view all your active and past reports in the 'Incident History' tab available in your Profile Drawer.
faq.q2: How long does it take for an issue to be resolved?
faq.a2: SLA times depend on severity. Critical issues are aimed for 24-48 hours, while medium priority may take 7-14 business days.
faq.q3: Is my personal information visible to the public?
faq.a3: No. Only authorized Municipal Admins can see the contact details attached to a specific ticket for verification purposes.
faq.q4: How do I change my selected Municipal Corporation?
faq.a4: You can log out from the Profile Drawer and select a new Corporation when logging back in.
faq.q5: What happens if I submit a false report?
faq.a5: Our AI validates all submissions. Repeated false reporting will lower your trust score and may result in account suspension.
faq.q6: Can I edit a report after submission?
faq.a6: Once a report is submitted, you cannot edit the details. However, you can add annotations or provide additional evidence via the Incident History tab.

about.title: Civic Shield
about.desc: Civic Shield is an automated, high-accuracy telemetry mapping interface designed to bridge citizens directly with their municipal corporations. Built for transparency, accountability, and rapid response.
